title: graphRAG golden eval set (eval/golden.yaml)
description: Frozen contract (Track 0 P4, DESIGN §20/§27.5, DR-002) for each project's eval/golden.yaml — the input the eval runner (C10) scores builds against and the activation preflight (§14) gates on. Unlike the response contracts, this file is human-authored, so unknown keys are rejected everywhere (additionalProperties: false): a typo'd expectation that silently never runs would turn the eval gate false-green. Evolution is additive (add a property to the schema); a breaking change bumps schema_version and adds a DESIGN §26 entry.

cases.description: At least one case: a present-but-empty golden set would make the eval gate pass vacuously.

QueryMode.description: Kept identical to QueryMode in contracts/openapi.yaml and contracts/mcp_response.schema.json — a golden case exercises one of the five frozen retrieval modes.

RelationExpectation.description: One expected relation, as canonical entity names plus relation type. Direction matters: relation signatures are directional (§27.3), so src→dst is not dst→src.

Expects.description: Assertions the answer must satisfy (§20, extended by §27.5). At least one: a case with nothing to check cannot fail and would inflate the eval score.

must_contain_entities.description: Canonical entity names the results must contain — drives entity_recall (§20).

must_cite_sources.description: source_uris the answer's source_refs must cover — drives source_recall / citation coverage (§20).

answer_regex.description: Pattern the answer text must match (§20).

must_include_relations.description: Expected relations the results must hit — drives relation_hit_rate (§27.5).

must_have_valid_paths.description: When true, every returned path must be a real path on the active build's graph — drives path_validity (§27.5). false disables the check explicitly (same as absent).

groundedness_min.description: Minimum groundedness: the share of answer claims backed by cited sources (§27.5).

GoldenCase.description: One golden question (§20): question + mode + expects + min_score. The question text is the case's stable identity across builds.

min_score.description: Per-case pass threshold on the case score (scores are 0..1, like every score/confidence in the frozen contracts).
